description: Converts cross-cutting synthesis proposals into executable per-session handoffs. Load-bearing primitive closing the synthesis->execution loop. Eval adapter mirrors the real synthesis-translator.sh invocation (model, permission mode, disallowed tools) in a throwaway sandbox.
known_gaps: idempotency stratum (pre-existing handoff collision) not covered in v1.
stale-state stratum IS covered (contrary to v1 assumption): the eval sandbox reads the real workspace and the model primary-verifies unprompted; see golden/dimensions.md.
